sections.paragraph:
with suff. מִשְׂגַּבִּי (from the root שָׂנַב) m.-

(1) height, Isa 25:12.

(2) a lofty place, a rock, affording shelter and security; hence used for a refuge itself, Psa 9:10 18:3 46:8 , 12 Ps4 6:12 48:4 59:10 , 18 Ps5 9:18 94:22 .

(3) with art. [Misgab], pr.n. of a town (situated on a lofty place) in Moab, Jer 48:1.
